reviews.review_description:
The game has 2 major issues
1) as soon as you will cross “top 20 players” line the game may be deleted as you only will be able to attack ctrl+c ctrl+v no brain 2-rooms dungeons which designed not to give you a complicated and good fight, but instead to just force you to waste as much time as possible on running so you will loose because you will be run out of time (for 2 rooms dungeons there is just 5 minute time limit and people simply abuse it by adding a lot of objectives which player must to destroy to “clean” the room)
I believe barbaria suppose to be about battles, the game’s name is not “running with a hammer simulator”
2) control is extremely bad because you cannot calibrate zones from which the game will trigger grabbing a weapon from the belt. As result - you need to spend 50% of your focus on double checking that you indeed put weapons on your belt and not just dropped them. Same with equipping weapons, Im really tired to see  bunch of goblins, charge it, grab my weapon and then find that I grabbed none and now Um standing in the middle of the swarm with my fists only

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear of your troubles but I'm glad you like the core of the game!  Join us at stalwart.com/discord if you have suggestions for improving the end game! Would also love to hear more detail about the struggles you're having with grabbing!

reviews.review_description:
Fun 10/10
Physics 7/10
Dificilty: 8/10 
 Progressive, I really liked the balance of the game. As soon as I was thinking this is easy, it got really hard fast, I loved that.

The dungeon where u can choose upgrades and keep fighting are dope af, made feel like I was playing some funnier version of Hades on vr.

I'm 26y, loved this, this is low-key a very good game... I get that 20$ can scare, devs should put this as 10$ ou 5$ to upsell skins and attract more players.
 
This meta world is populated with kids with their gtag lame game and copys of that same lame  game, so this does not pick the attention of the general public. But if you looking for Progressive fighting game that is really funny and at the same time dificult this is it.

I'm not the biggest fan of the base creating and defending but I get that is a way of the community keep the game alive creating fun for new players.

Overall this a MUST PLAY

reviews.review_title: One of my favorite games but..
reviews.review_description:
Updated review based on developers response.

I’m one of those guys that love sword and sorcery. From Conan to Beast Masters to being angry there is only one episode of Korgoth of Barbaria.

This game is the ultimate barbarian fantasy in VR. 
And it’s not a game of finesse where you need a large room to play  .
I play in tiny room and since I’m a muscle bound creature I can just smash. 
It’s beautiful and wonderful game play but.. 

No offline mode ! 

This is insane it’s not even a forced multiplayer game.

I was checking which games you can play once meta shuts more servers down like they did to Larcenauts and this is not one of them.

So randomly you won’t be able to play this game anymore.

Beside that it’s my dream sword and sorcery game .

Love the combat and level progression. Even the music

Now when the developers do make an offline mode I’ll be happy to put 5 stars. I just want insurance I can play this game decades from now .

developer_response.body:
Glad you like it and totally understand that the offline concern.
One of the benefits of the asynchronous multiplayer style is that our server costs are lower compared to regular multiplayer games. So it's unlikely we'll ever need to shut down the backend.  If we ever did we'd certainly release a patch with a massive dump of realms and offline save data but I really don't think it's likely.

reviews.review_title: Good game! Great game in fact!
reviews.review_description: So I thought this was going to be a stupid Gorn rippoff, so I was surprised when I saw what Barbaria had in stock! Few questions and suggestions though. The blood and gore does not stain weapons, or at least in this version. I would like to have that. Also please add a sandbox to experiment, and add some more detailed gore. Not that the current blood is bad. Overall, awsome game with lots of content. Thank you for this game and continue to update.

developer_response.body: Glad you're enjoying it! You can use the "Playground" are with "No Limits" mode once you unlock it to get a little crazier with building for fun!  We're working a bit on expanding the features of playground too :)

reviews.review_description:
This is a long review so scroll to the bottom to see about my experience in the game and not just 1 level that i cant beat.

Ive been playing through the campaign, the whole time i was having so much fun, it was not hard to beat the levels, it was medium in terms of difficulty, then i got to the level, queendom, i tried 3 days in a row to beat this, i still cant beat it, it feels like its a rage game. Not only can i not beat the level, but I can't upgrade untill i level up my base which requires me to beat multiple bases, this is ridiculous, i got the mission early in the game where everything was easy, now im way more experienced and have better weapons and still cant beat it.
But overall i think the game is great, i would give a 5 star rating but its 4 stars because the queendom challenge should be way later in the game. 

Anyways, i think the idea of this game is amazing, raiding bases, earning money to upgrade and buy weapons, the throw mechanics remind me of gorn vr where if you throw someone into the ground they bounce off like a cartoon, its so satisfying hitting a mortal kombat finisher on them. I also like the parry mechanics, it makes the game more reactive and you have to learn to fight strategically. 
I do think there should be a 1 playee option too where you can use mods but i understand that would be hard for the devs to do.
So people who like mods, sorry, no mod support
I was hesitant on playing at first thinking it was crap but it's a great game and having the ability to watch other players replays on raiding your dungeon is great

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words!

reviews.review_description: An amazing game at first i didn’t understand how the mechanics work like upgrading your territory i was wondering why i always did but when i finally understood why and what to do I was instantly hooked Great game!!
What an awesome game, really addicted to this right now. Would never have known about this without horizon+. C'mon people, try my base 😀.

Developers, please read this. I have been looking for a game like this forever because I love gorn so much but then I started to get sick of it. So I was looking for a new game like it and I found this game, but I really want you guys to add like official campaign mode, a sandbox mode and a multiplayer mode that just be awesome.
Absolutely LOVE this game! Everything about it! The base building, the raids, the playstyle. It's all superb! I just keep going back for more!

Honestly it’s one of the greatest most addicting game I’ve ever played but I did run in to a bug 

I spawned in another players realm and it was normal until my cyclops died then all the enemies just looked at me standing still so I go to punch an imp he falls back gets back up and just stood there all of them were like this until I ran out of time 

Anyway I really like the game but it be nice if you added: a sandbox completely free (I’m looking at you playground) and no limits a multiplayer kinda like sales dead mans island  and I don’t like the fact I have to wait a day to play champions arena and caverns of the unknown

reviews.review_title: This is the best game ever!
reviews.review_description: Ever since I got the game I have been playing it everyday! Definitely give this a try!

reviews.review_title: Very great game but one bug
reviews.review_description: Its a fun game and very addicting but its just annoying when sometimes you are defending when your champion die the enemies just stands still instead of destroying the crystal so that they can move to the next level of your realm. Its gets annoying because there is no option to just stop the raid instead you need to leave and its takes a while to load the game even when your in quest 3
Very fun, Good Graphics, Good Gore, Rougelike is fun, base building is great. But more turrets and units would be cool to have.

developer_response.body: Glad you like it! Let's us know your suggestions at stalwart.com/discord

reviews.review_title: I don't know what to say
reviews.review_description: It's perfect the best game
how to get this hat with the horns?
One of my favourites games. Much better than Gorn.
So fun love coming back to see if my defense have been broken

The Barbaria: A Must-Play VR Experience!
If you're looking for a game that blends the strategic depth of Clash of Clans with the immersive thrill of virtual reality, then The Barbaria is an absolute must-have. I've had a fantastic time with this game; it's genuinely fun and incredibly engaging. The VR aspect truly elevates the classic base-building and raiding mechanics, making you feel like you're right in the thick of the action. Don't miss out – get it today and join the fun!

FIND Me On Facebook.

Quirky, fun, keeps ya moving, pubic competition, rpg. Only my first day playing and this is a must have game. 
Reminds me of the old Dungeon Keeper game and I've been hoping for a VR version forever. Keep it up and I can't wait to see where social interaction and game growth will go with this one. Freaking awesome, keep at it and well done to the team working on this 🤘
Would love to see co-op or PvP live 🤞
One of the last games I bought when it should have been one of the first

Minions- Goblin: Similar to Krank except it is a minion and has no divine juice.

Winged Goblin: A flying goblin that only uses ranged weapons and has a ground pound.

Golem: A rare creature made of rocks that is obtained from shop (where it costs 500) Trogre King’s Quest (more about that later) and rewards. Attacks are: Arm Swing: Exactly what it sounds like, decent damage, high knockback. Smash: Smashes ground, high damage, decent knockback, creates damaging shockwave. Breakdown: Breaks apart into boulders that hurl themselves at enemies, then reforms. damage and knockback depending on boulder size. Laser bolt: Ranged attack where it shoots a laser bolt from its eye. Deals very high damage and instantly breaks shields and non-crystal structures, low knockback. Defensive capabilities are: Takes less damage, Level 1 Golem has 1.5x as much health as Level 1 Cyclotaur, immune to arrows and stabbing. Weaknesses are: Explosives, Hammers, Bombloving Psychopath (a minion). Unique capabilities: Explodes on death, summons Rockies on death, takes less damage when there are crystals in the fragment it is in (only works when defending). 

Giant: A giant. Can punch, smash and throw large rocks. Level one giant has 1.5 times as much health as a level three Zealot. Obtained in the same way you obtain the Golem.

Trogre: Mix of a troll and an ogre. Level one Trogre has twice the health of a level one Cyclotaur. Takes less damage from blunt weapons (including fists). Attacks are: Club smash: Smashes the ground with its club. High damage and decent knockback. Club swing: Swings its club. Decent damage and very high knockback. Boulder throw: Ranged attack. Rips a boulder from the ground and throws it. Explodes into rocks upon impact. Decent damage and knockback. Unique capabilities: Can eat corpses to regain health. Max level is three due to its power.

Rocky: A small creature. Weakest creature on this list. Even a level one imp could one shot it. However, it is incredibly dangerous despite being weak. You will see why. Attacks: Pebble punch: Punches target. Does nothing. Has one point of health. Cannot be upgraded. Unique capabilities: Creates the most powerful and deadly explosion in the game that can one shot a level 3 zealot. This is why you don’t want to kill it.

Weapons- Rocky Sack: A sack full of Rockies. Don’t worry, they don’t have an explosion as powerful as the minion. They are basically better bombs.

Mace: A spiky club. Deals more damage than club.

Club: Better hammer.

Marauder’s Mace: An iron mace. Whoever holds it takes a little damage from attacking. Deals more damage than mace.

Trogre Club: A VERY large club. Only obtained by killing a Trogre. Requires two hands to hold and cannot be sheathed due to its size.

Scythe: a scythe.

Fragments- Battlefield of the Ancients: Very large flat fragment.

Coliseum: Big Arena

Levels- Trogre King’s Quest: A quest unlocked at level four realm. Completing the quest will reward you.

Broken Underworld: Comes after Krank’s level. Beating it will give you Reaperoth.

Cursed Temple: A temple. Beating it gives you the Undefined Statue.

Bombed Wasteland: A large level. Gives you the Bombloving Pyschopath.

Land of Cannons: The longest level on this list other than the Trogre King’s Quest. Beating it gives you The Living Tower.

Bosses- Powerful creatures that can give you nerfed versions of them upon defeat, but minion versions will not give you the boss if you kill one. Only the actual thing gives it. Some are too large to raid and can only be placed on certain fragments.

Bombloving Psychopath: An armored imp who throws explosives. At death, it pulls out a massive bomb that creates a huge and very dangerous explosion while laughing psychologically.

Undefined Statue: A magic statue with the ability to shoot lasers, create spikes, teleport, and use telekinesis. Falls apart on death.

The Living Tower: A tower with metal strider legs and a cannon. Can stab with its legs, shoot cannonballs, summon cannons from the side of the map, shoot imps, and shoot a deadly laser. Explodes on death. Can only be placed on the Battlefield of the Ancients.

Trogre King: Actual boss fought every twenty Trogre King Quests. Has the attacks of a Trogre, and can also ground pound with its club, chuck lots of boulders, spin with it’s club, throw its club like a boomerang, and create shockwaves each time it smashes the ground. Can only be placed on Coliseum or Battlefield of the Ancients.

Champions- Reaperoth: A reaper who was rejected by the Ancients. Deals more damage with a scythe. Also has lifesteal. Divine Juice: Brainwashes the next enemy that is attacked.

Thank you for reading this. If you are the creator of the game, if you add any of these to the game, thank you. I spent a lot of time working on this. By a guy who wants to share his ideas to everyone.
This is the best fighting game I’ve ever played in be😁😁

I hadn't played in a few months. And lost my stuff, it's like the game forgot my progress. Had to basically start over. It's still a good game, but I don't feel like starting over.

Edit:  game support showed me how to carry over my progress from the quest environment to pc vr. Great game, fantastic support. Barbaria 2, with CO-OP in the future? Who knows. It's fun to invade others and see how much the game has evolved over time.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear that happened!  We can recover you old account no problem.  Ping us in the discord at barbariavr/discord or email support@stalwart.com and we'll get it sorted out. Glad you're loving the game!

reviews.review_description: This is the most underrated game i have. There are few games where you can just have chaos everywhere you look, but it runs very well. You design ranked and unranked maps for yourself and others to enjoy. The recent update uncapped a lot of limits for unranked maps, so it has just been a blast. This game deserves some love!
fight system is so nice.
Classic slap stick. Get BBC bottom vibs. Not a game changer but happy what it is.

reviews.review_title: Great game but needs some work
reviews.review_description: It’s a great game really fun i think they have some stuff they could do better like the explanation of how the game works I was stuck for a while cause I didint know that I had to upgrade my base separately to go up in tier
probably bots raiding and the gameplay loop feels heavily gated with unwinnable battles required to progress or purchases
PRETTY GOOD GAME ITS FUN

I’ve played about 3 hours and have really been enjoying this game. This game has solid progression, a fun gameplay loop, great music, charm, and interesting strategy. A lot of VR games feel more like demos than full games, so I really enjoyed that this game seems more thought out as far as progression goes. I hope they continue to support this game for a long time!

developer_response.body: We love you hear you've been having fun with it! Our next content update is in progress!

reviews.review_description: I got this game hoping it would last awhile after completing the tutorial and playing a couple game I realized that there are only 6 different minions and 3 different playable characters I was hoping there would be more especially minions also it puts a cap on the level you can get to on every which is 5 overall good game I think I set my expectations to high

developer_response.body: Happy to hear you enjoyed it initially and I hope we can meet and surpass your expectations as we update the game! This is our discord if you want to offer suggestions or other feedback!  https://discord.gg/ZyGzJRQURm

reviews.review_description: The game is fun for the first 10 minutes or so, and then you're put into challenge levels and other players worlds that become increasingly difficult and super frustrating. The level system is unbalanced and can be put you into a world that are unbeatable, because out of no where there's soo many enemies that attack you all at once, and you can't block them all at the same time, so you basically become soft blocked and cant continue and die over and over. You die over and over untill you get so frustrated and just quit the game all together. You cant upgrade yourself because you don't have enough money to update yourself. You get stuck in this loop, where you get up to a certain level, and then thats when the game gets difficult, and then you die, your overall score goes down so the game puts you in that percentage of people with that level, you beat those levels you get up to the same high level again, and then you die, and go down in level again. Its a endless cycle.When a game tends to get difficult and frustrating for no reason, its a putt off and makes me not want to play the game. Great concept, but horrible execution. it wasn't so horrendously difficult for no reason id enjoy it more.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback on difficulty and sorry it's been frustrating so far. Sounds like you've hit an early difficulty cliff and that lack of early funds are causing a problem. This is our discord  https://discord.gg/ZyGzJRQURm.  Hopefully we can improve your experience as we improve the game.  We'd love to move you from frustration to enjoyment!  One tip I should've added! Have you unlocked the meteor strike yet?  If so, it's pretty powerful but it can be hard to remember to un-possess your champion to use it.

reviews.review_description:
I purchased 2 days ago and was having fun from the start. I upgraded everything to level 3, including weapons and characters plus minions. Despite everything I've upgraded, I still l can't beat Queendom for 2 days. She seems to scale with your player, so if you cant beat her you never will. My only option is to reset the game or spend my time losing and being totally disappointed.

Fun game and visual appealing, but it needs serious work or there will be a lot of frustrated people.

Edit: not sure what happened  but as soon as I logged off and back into the game I was instantly able to pass Queendom. Game is now moving forward slowly.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear about your frustration! We've had feedback from a few players in our discord that the mission it too hard we may end up reducing difficulty there a bit. In the meantime a few things that might help.  Don't forget to use your meteor strike to damage her right off the beginning.  A shield is great for protecting yourself against her axe throw if you've found one. This is our discord https://discord.gg/ZyGzJRQURm if you are interested is telling us more.  We, and other players, may be able to help you a bit. Thanks for your feedback!

reviews.review_description:
Barbaria is a raid style fighting game where you can raid other players bases or cpu bases to advance in the story and unlock more gear/allies. You can build your own base to defend against other players using traps, minions and unlockable terrain pieces, overall great game!
For 25% off remove the space before appreferrals and use the link 

https://www.oculus.com/ appreferrals/manymanlymen/5296016923775393/?utm_source=2

My first thought when I started playing was 4.5 but after an hour that number starts to decline. At 3 hours I had enough and decided to leave a review. 

1) Poor collision detection
2) the bow is CRAP! 
   A) can't pull an arrow over right shoulder but grab a bow off my left hip?
   B) unable to turn with bow out.
   C) regularly, but randomly, decides to switch the hand you're holding, pulling the bow with.
3) as higher level players that are offline lose they get knocked down the leader board until that's all you have to choose from. IE absolute garbage match making. This alone renders the game unplayable.
4) new section of the base opened up but no instructions. Nothing to interact with. WTH?
5) highlight rock, pick up rock, through my hammer.
6) why can the enemy champion run and I can't?

I hope you fix these issues but given the current score it's doubtful. Is it really that difficult to have a functional matchmaking system? Or is it simply more profitable to cater to the handful of hardcore players most likely to pay for skins down the road and F it you already have the other people's money?

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear you're having so many issues with the game but we do appreciate the feedback regardless.  I'll try to respond here but you can also hop into our discord if you're inclined to give more detail! https://discord.gg/ZyGzJRQURm
1) We've tried to strike a balance between complete physical accuracy while making sure the player isn't getting their weapons awkwardly stuck. 
2) The way the bow works is that which ever hand you grab an arrow with the other hand automatically has a bow. You're right that you need to use the right stick with the bow to turn all the way around,  this should be improved.
3) Sorry to hear the matchmaking isn't landing for you.  It should be giving you realms to attack around your mightiness level.  Would love to hear more about what you're seeing.
4) The finals section that opens up (as of now) is just a (hopefully) fun sight gag.
6) Sounds like you'd like to see running as an option. We didn't allow player controlled champions to run primarily for balance (and a bit for comfort) reasons but sounds like you'd cast a vote to add player running.
We'll certainly tackle what we can in patches and updates!

reviews.review_description: Soo good

reviews.review_title: A true casual melee combat for VR…
reviews.review_description:
… And I say it in the best way possible. 

Gorn feels too sticky for me, B&S is a bit too cumbersome, Until You Fall is something different entirely. And the back-and-forth nature of them just tire me out.

Look, when I play melee combat in VR, especially after a long work, I just want something like this: I swing my arm, monsters got smashed, I win, simple, keep the back-and-forth *****h** for higher rank enemy. 

Love the game.

Embody the champion strength of some weird barbarian with a metal Mohawk as you create absolute CARNAGE. You pretty much get to raid other peoples custom realms as you make you way through to gain might and violence (it’s a currency idk) using that you can buy and upgrade traps for your realm to make it impossible to beat, have fun and kill something!
